title: Crematory Operators
description: Operate crematory equipment to reduce human or animal remains to bone fragments in accordance with state and local regulations. Duties may include preparing the body for cremation and performing general maintenance on crematory equipment. May use traditional flame-based cremation, calcination, or alkaline hydrolysis.

tasks.text: Clean the crematorium, including tables, floors, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document divided remains to ensure parts are not misplaced.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Embalm, dress, or otherwise prepare the deceased for viewing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain the cremation process to family or friends of the deceased.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Offer counsel and comfort to bereaved families or friends.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Pick up and handle human or pet remains in a respectful manner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place corpses into crematory machines to reduce remains to bone fragments using flame, heat, or alkaline hydrolysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pulverize remaining bone fragments into smaller pieces, using specialized equipment, such as a cremulator or grinder.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read documentation to confirm the identity of the deceased.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove jewelry, watches, or other personal items from the deceased prior to cremation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sweep or vacuum the cremation chamber to retrieve remains for storage in an urn or other container.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport the deceased to a funeral home or crematory using a van, hearse, or other vehicle.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
